result:
**Goal: Add a "Rule Explorer" mode that lets users experiment with alternative cellular automaton rulesets beyond standard Conway B3/S23.**

This would let users interactively modify the birth/survival conditions (e.g., B36/S23 for "HighLife", B1357/S1357 for "Replicator", etc.), see the rule displayed in the status bar, and include a handful of famous preset rulesets to cycle through. The existing pattern detector and age visualization would continue to work under any ruleset, making it a natural extension that transforms the app from a Conway's Life viewer into a general outer-totalistic cellular automaton sandbox.
